description: qa-scope cockpit panel. `compose qa-scope <CODE>` (changed files to affected routes) is terminal-only; COMP-QA shipped the diff-to-route mapper as a build-phase step but there is no standalone cockpit view. Surface affected-route analysis in the cockpit backed by the existing qa-scoping logic so UI-first review can see what a change touches.

completions.notes: qa-scope cockpit panel + GET /api/qa-scope (degraded-error + clear-on-switch). Shipped in parity batch.
